headline: AI has a water problem. Google thinks it has a fix
summary: Google addresses backlash over AI data center water consumption. The company outlines five commitments to increase water replenishment for local communities. Google aims to minimize the environmental impact of its AI buildout.

headline: Google must let publishers opt out of AI Search features, rules UK
summary: UK regulators rule Google must allow publishers to opt out of AI Search features. A new CMA conduct rule gives website owners more control over content use. Publishers can prevent their content from being used in AI Overviews.

headline: God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5
summary: Sony revealed the next installment, God of War Laufey, at State of Play. Santa Monica Studio is developing the new title for the PS5. No release date has been announced for the game yet.

headline: Remedy’s Control sequel launches in September
summary: Control Resonant, the sequel to Remedy Entertainment's Control, launches on September 24th, 2026. A trailer previewing the game's story premiered during PlayStation's State of Play. The story will feature Dylan Faden, who was imprisoned in the first game.

headline: Avengers: Doomsday and Secret Wars Directors Rule Out a Third Movie, Both Are a 'Complete Expression'
summary: Directors Joe and Anthony Russo rule out a third Avengers movie. They state Doomsday and Secret Wars will be a 'complete expression' of their story. The upcoming blockbusters are intended as a conclusive narrative.

headline: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth Update Adds 'Streamlined Progression' to Make the Game Easier
summary: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth received a major update for PC and PlayStation 5. The patch introduces a new 'streamlined progression' feature. This update aims to make the game easier for players.

headline: The Legend of Vox Machina Season 4 Episodes 1-3 Review
summary: A new review covers the first three episodes of The Legend of Vox Machina Season 4. The review indicates the series is entering its 'endgame' phase. Early episodes set a conclusive tone for the season.

headline: Hell Let Loose: Vietnam Has Been Delayed Until August
summary: Hell Let Loose: Vietnam has been delayed, with a new release target of August. Post-beta feedback identified several areas needing additional development. The hardcore 50v50 milsim requires further work before launch.

headline: Royal Navy helicopter crashes into field
summary: A Royal Navy helicopter has crashed in a field. The Ministry of Defence has confirmed an investigation is underway. Details of the incident are under official inquiry.

headline: Three-quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
summary: A new report reveals three-quarters of workers are not on track for a moderate pension income. A moderate retirement lifestyle costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two. Many individuals face challenges in achieving adequate retirement savings.

headline: US and Iran launch new strikes, as Kuwait says airport hit by Iranian drones
summary: US and Iran have launched new strikes amid escalating tensions. Kuwait reports its international airport and civilian buildings were hit by Iranian drones. One person has reportedly died following the drone attacks in Kuwait.

headline: Giorgio Locatelli replaces John Torode as co-host of Celebrity MasterChef
summary: Italian restaurateur Giorgio Locatelli will join Grace Dent as co-host of Celebrity MasterChef. He replaces John Torode, who departed the series last year. Locatelli steps into a prominent role on the popular cooking competition.
